user.title: Samsung Soundbar
user.description: Choose how to authenticate with SmartThings.

oauth_creds.title: SmartThings OAuth Credentials
oauth_creds.description: Enter your SmartThings OAuth Client ID and Secret.

authorize.title: Authorize with SmartThings
authorize.description:
1. Open this URL in your browser:

{auth_url}

2. Log in with your Samsung account and authorize.
3. The page will say "All set!" — look in your browser's **URL bar**.
4. Copy the value after `code=` from the URL (stop before any `&`).
5. Paste it below.

pat.title: Personal Access Token
pat.description: Generate a token at https://account.smartthings.com/tokens with device scopes enabled. PATs expire after 24 hours.

abort.no_devices: No devices found on your SmartThings account.

init.title: Feature Toggles
init.description: Enable or disable feature groups. Disabling a group stops polling its endpoints, which reduces SmartThings API load.

data.enable_advanced_audio: Advanced Audio switches (Night Mode, Voice Amplifier, Bass Boost)

set_speaker_level.name: Set speaker level
set_speaker_level.description: Adjust the volume of an individual speaker channel (center, side, rear, etc.).

level.name: Level
level.description: Volume offset for the selected channel, from -6 dB to +6 dB.

set_rear_speaker_mode.name: Set rear speaker mode
set_rear_speaker_mode.description: Switch rear speakers between front and rear positioning.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Where the rear speakers should be positioned relative to the listener.
